TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Beinan mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 425.47 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 286.16 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 14.77 km²), 6,234 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,820 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,072 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 65%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Puyuma, Amis, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Beinan ays psgayun 13 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Ulivelivek , A'lripay , Likavung , Pinaski , Kalito'od , Fudafudak , Dikidiki , Taromak , Tamalakaw , Danadanaw .
S.PHON: βeinan mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pujuma, amis~ɕ, rukaj ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu βeinan ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, uli*eli*ek , aʔlripaj , lika*uŋ , pinas~ɕki , kalitoʔo* , *u*a*u*ak , *iki*iki , taromak , tamalakaw , *ana*anaw .
S.FORM: Beinan mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 425.47 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 286.16 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 14.77 km²), 6,234 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,820 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,072 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 65%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Puyuma, Amis, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Beinan ays psgayun 13 ru 10 alang. 10 alang hani ga, Ulivelivek , A'lripay , Likavung , Pinaski , Kalito'od , Fudafudak , Dikidiki , Taromak , Tamalakaw , Danadanaw .
S.PHON: βeinan mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pujuma, amis~ɕ, rukaj ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu βeinan ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, uli*eli*ek , aʔlripaj , lika*uŋ , pinas~ɕki , kalitoʔo* , *u*a*u*ak , *iki*iki , taromak , tamalakaw , *ana*anaw .
